tooltips.tooltipText:
The “Fair chance” label is provided for informational purposes only. It is based on information included in job descriptions, such as that the employer follows “fair chance” hiring practices. This is not directly reported by employers.

Note that many employers are required by law to consider applicants with criminal histories. Check state and local laws for more about job seeker rights.
